result.stdout:
skynet:
  A command line tool to upload files to Sia Skynet

Usage:
  skynet [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  upload <item>    Uploads an item to Sia Skynet

result.stdout:
upload:
  Uploads an item to Sia Skynet

Usage:
  skynet upload [options] <item>

Arguments:
  <item>    File or directory to upload

Options:
  -r, --recurse     If you want to recurse the directory
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
